description: GitHubData.prs_loaded defaults to True, but an empty GitHubData (constructed with no arguments) has no loaded PR data. The default should be False to match the semantic that no repos have been fetched. Current production code always sets prs_loaded explicitly, but the incorrect default is a latent bug for any future code that constructs GitHubData without specifying prs_loaded.

_lookup_pr fallback (for agents without a known repo, e.g. remote/modal agents) returns the first PR matching the branch name across all repos. If multiple repos have PRs on the same branch name, the result is arbitrary (depends on dict insertion order). This is an intentional best-effort trade-off documented in the docstring, but could produce incorrect results in multi-repo setups where branch names collide.
